---
name: Capability Proposal
about: Propose a new capability or modify an existing one
title: "[CAPABILITY] "
labels: capability-proposal
assignees: ""
---

## Capability Name

Name of the proposed capability.

## Layer

- [ ] Platform / Infrastructure
- [ ] Runtime / Agentic
- [ ] Cross-Cutting

## Description

What does this capability do? Why does it deserve its own abstraction?

## Operations

List the operations this capability would include:

| Operation | Description | Inputs | Outputs |
|-----------|-------------|--------|---------|
| | | | |

## Provider Examples

At least two different providers that could implement this capability
(demonstrates vendor neutrality):

1. **Provider A**: How it would implement the operations.
2. **Provider B**: How it would implement the operations differently.

## Justification

Why this capability should be part of the spec rather than being part of
an existing capability or left to provider-specific extensions.
